title: ASSESSMENT OF THE LEVEL OF SECURITY AVAILABLE IN 4G AND 5G MOBILE COMMUNICATION NETWORKS
author: Shukhratjon Umarov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper evaluates security tolerance in 4G and 5G networks. It shows the vulnerability and resilience of 4G and 5G networks to DDoS, Eavesdropping, Man-in-the-Middle, Signal Hijacking and Sim Cloning attacks. Information about existing and possible problems in the 5G network will be provided. The results of the security work that can be implemented in 5G and its tolerance with existing security measures are shown
